Performance & Scale

Built to scale with your program

As travel programs grow in complexity — more entities, more approval layers, more booking channels, more reporting requirements — the platform should scale with them without breaking down.

⚡

Fast Operational Workflows

Approval flows, policy visibility, and reporting that support action without delay. Performance means responsive interfaces and data that is current when you need it.

📈

Built for Growing Portfolios

Cinturon360 is being built for TMCs managing growing client rosters and for organisations expanding across entities and geographies. Scale should not require redesigning the operating model.

⚙️

Scalable Governance

Support multiple entities, layered approval structures, varied traveller categories, client-specific policies, and mixed booking channels — without governance becoming a bottleneck.

🔗

Integration-Aware Performance

Governance should not slow down the booking experience. The platform is being designed so that policy checks, approval routing, and data flows operate efficiently alongside existing booking channels.

Dimensions of scale Cinturon360 is built for

Multiple client entities

Layered approval chains

Varied traveller categories

Client-specific policies

Mixed booking channels

Supplier diversity

Increasing compliance needs

Growing reporting demands

Cinturon360 is coming soon

Cinturon360 is an upcoming travel governance and visibility platform designed to work with existing booking channels, apply policy and approvals, and deliver finance-grade reporting. Join the waitlist to follow the launch.

Join Waitlist Book a Demo
